name: @janumipwb/rph-authoring
description: The PWA-authoring capability layer — an LLM-agnostic CapabilityBroker of READ + PROPOSE operations over the rph-engine seam, scoped to a single DRAFT PWA. Every proposal issues a real domain command (as an AGENT actor) so the engine's fail-loud validation IS the guardrail; the same broker backs both the node-graph UI actions and the Pi agent's tools. Also the home of the copy-on-use PWU Type catalog + field help (browser-safe, exported from ./catalog).
